overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple interior. The character approaches a golden statue shrine, circles around it, and exits through a columned hall into a sunlit courtyard with a rectangular pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple sanctum with golden statue shrine

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the golden statue shrine at the end of the temple chamber

entered.detail: recessed niche containing a golden humanoid statue illuminated by warm light
large stone column with colorful painted capitals and hieroglyphic carvings
rectangular stone block positioned in front of the statue shrine
metal bowl containing burning fire providing warm illumination
stone wall covered with Egyptian hieroglyphic inscriptions and colorful murals

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the dimly lit temple interior toward a golden statue enshrined in a recessed niche. The space features decorated columns with painted capitals, hieroglyphic walls, and scattered flower petals on the marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: circumambulating the statue shrine toward side exit

events.description: character turns right to navigate around the right side of the statue shrine structure

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the side of the statue shrine structure

entered.detail: plain stone wall section with minimal decoration

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the right side of the statue shrine, moving from the frontal approach to a side passage. The golden statue disappears from view as the character navigates the temple's interior architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: columned processional hall leading to exterior

events.description: increasing natural light intensity as character approaches the bright temple exit doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the long columned hall toward the bright exit, silhouetted against the light

entered.detail: large rectangular doorway emitting intense bright sunlight from outside

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long corridor lined with decorated columns and hieroglyphic walls, moving toward a brightly lit exit. The lighting transitions from warm artificial to intense natural backlighting as the exterior approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit peristyle courtyard with central pool

events.description: character exits the temple interior into the bright sunlit courtyard with pool

agents.ego_description: walking out of the temple into the open courtyard, passing a seated figure near the wall

notable_agents.action: seated figure resting against the temple wall near flower petals

entered.detail: rectangular pool of greenish water surrounded by stone pavement
exterior temple walls with columns visible across the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the temple into a bright sunlit courtyard featuring a central rectangular pool. The space is surrounded by an outer colonnade, with a seated NPC visible near the entrance wall as the character explores the open area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, ornate depths of an Egyptian temple into a brilliant, open-air courtyard. It begins with the character walking across a marble floor scattered with flower petals toward a golden statue enshrined in a recessed niche among hieroglyphic walls. As the character circles around the right side of the shrine, the golden figure disappears from view, guiding the camera into a side passage. The scene then shifts into a long corridor lined with decorated columns, where the warm interior lighting gradually gives way to intense natural backlighting. Finally, the camera emerges from the temple into the blinding sunlight of a courtyard featuring a central rectangular pool and an outer colonnade with a seated figure nearby.
